notices: No free rent or abatement is provided per the lease.
No taxes line item found in the lease document.
No one-time charges (security deposit, TIA, commissions, etc.) are mentioned in this lease amendment.

recurringCharges.label: Common Area Maintenance
recurringCharges.evidenceText: Common Area Maintenance: $1,800.00 per month during the first Lease Year. Common Area Maintenance shall increase three percent (3%) on each January 20 beginning January 20, 2029.

recurringCharges.label: Management Charge
recurringCharges.evidenceText: Management Charge: $175.00 per month during the first Lease Year. Management Charge shall increase two percent (2%) on each January 20 beginning January 20, 2029.

recurringCharges.label: Insurance
recurringCharges.evidenceText: Insurance: $550.00 per month during the first Lease Year. Insurance shall increase two percent (2%) on each January 20 beginning January 20, 2029.
